questions: When did your knee pain first start — roughly how long ago was that?
How would you describe the pain — is it a dull ache, sharp, or something else?
On a scale of 1 to 10, how bad is the knee pain at its worst, and at its best?
Is the pain constant throughout the day, or does it come and go?
Does anything make the pain better or worse — for example, rest, movement, heat, or cold?
Did anything happen just before the pain started — like an injury, a change in activity, or a period of increased stress?
Have you noticed any swelling, warmth, or redness around your knee?
Does the pain wake you up at night or stop you from doing activities you normally would?
Which knee is affected — or is it both?

bias_questions: Have you noticed any changes to your weight recently — either up or down?
Have you had any fevers or night sweats?
Is there anyone in your family with similar symptoms or related conditions?
Any joint swelling or morning stiffness lasting more than 30 minutes?
